recommended.song_name: Sorry Seems To Be The Hardest Word

content:
You sang to me - Marc Anthony
Capo: 1

[Intro]
| [ch]C[/ch] |

[tab]    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah          Oh[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]           
I just wanted you to comfort me. When I called you late last night you see,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]      
I was falling into love, yes, I was crashing into love.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
Of all the words you said to me, about life, the truth and being free.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, you sang to me, oh, you sang to me. Girl, I live for how you make me feel,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                    [ch]Am[/ch]
so I question all this being real. 'Cause I'm not afraid to love,[/tab]
[tab]                                                 [ch]F[/ch]
for the first time, I'm not afraid to love. This day seems made for you and me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
and you showed me where I wanna be. You sang to me, oh, you sang to me.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]    
All the while you were in front of me I never realized. [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I just can't believe I didn't see it in your eyes.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I didn't see it, I can't believe it, [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
oh, but I feel it, when you sing to me.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Now I long to hear you sing beneath the clear blue skies[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]    
and I promise you this time I'll see it in your eyes.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I didn't see it, I can't believe it, [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
oh, but I feel it, oh.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  
Just to think you live inside of me, I had no idea how this could be.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                                       
Now I'm crazy for your love,  can't believe I'm crazy for your love.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                                      [ch]G[/ch]
The words you said you sang to me  and you showed me what life needs to be,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
you sang to me, oh, you sang to me.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]    
All the while you were in front of me I never realized. [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I just can't believe I didn't see it in your eyes.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I didn't see it, I can't believe it, [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
oh, but I feel it.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Now I long to hear you sing beneath the clear blue skies[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]    
and I promise you this time I'll see it in your eyes.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I didn't see it, I can't believe it, [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
oh, but I feel it, when you sing to me.[/tab]
